We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.17s, d = 36.89m:
t^2 = 2.17 * 2.17:
2.17 * 0.07 = 0.1519
2.17 * 0.10 = 0.2170
2.17 * 2.00 = 4.3400
0.1519 + 0.2170 = 0.3689
0.3689 + 4.3400 = 4.7089
k = 36.89 / 2.17^2 = 36.89 / 4.7089 = 36.890 / 4.708
= 0 + 1 * 36890 / 4708
= 1 + 1 * 32182 / 4708
= 2 + 1 * 27474 / 4708
= 3 + 1 * 22766 / 4708
= 4 + 1 * 18058 / 4708
= 5 + 1 * 13350 / 4708
= 6 + 1 * 8642 / 4708
= 7 + 1 * 3934 / 4708
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 39340 / 4708
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 34632 / 4708
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 29924 / 4708
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 25216 / 4708
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 20508 / 4708
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 15800 / 4708
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 11092 / 4708
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 6384 / 4708
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 1676 / 4708
= 7.80 + 0.01 * 16760 / 4708
= 7.81 + 0.01 * 12052 / 4708
= 7.82 + 0.01 * 7344 / 4708
= 7.83 + 0.01 * 2636 / 4708
= 7.830 + 0.001 * 26360 / 4708
= 7.831 + 0.001 * 21652 / 4708
= 7.832 + 0.001 * 16944 / 4708
= 7.833 + 0.001 * 12236 / 4708
= 7.834 + 0.001 * 7528 / 4708
= 7.835 + 0.001 * 2820 / 4708
= 7.835

t = 2.37s, d = 44.0m:
t^2 = 2.37 * 2.37:
2.37 * 0.07 = 0.1659
2.37 * 0.30 = 0.7110
2.37 * 2.00 = 4.7400
0.1659 + 0.7110 = 0.8769
0.8769 + 4.7400 = 5.6169
k = 44.0 / 2.37^2 = 44.0 / 5.6169 = 44.000 / 5.616
= 0 + 1 * 44000 / 5616
= 1 + 1 * 38384 / 5616
= 2 + 1 * 32768 / 5616
= 3 + 1 * 27152 / 5616
= 4 + 1 * 21536 / 5616
= 5 + 1 * 15920 / 5616
= 6 + 1 * 10304 / 5616
= 7 + 1 * 4688 / 5616
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 46880 / 5616
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 41264 / 5616
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 35648 / 5616
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 30032 / 5616
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 24416 / 5616
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 18800 / 5616
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 13184 / 5616
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 7568 / 5616
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 1952 / 5616
= 7.80 + 0.01 * 19520 / 5616
= 7.81 + 0.01 * 13904 / 5616
= 7.82 + 0.01 * 8288 / 5616
= 7.83 + 0.01 * 2672 / 5616
= 7.830 + 0.001 * 26720 / 5616
= 7.831 + 0.001 * 21104 / 5616
= 7.832 + 0.001 * 15488 / 5616
= 7.833 + 0.001 * 9872 / 5616
= 7.834 + 0.001 * 4256 / 5616
= 7.834

t = 2.81s, d = 61.86m:
t^2 = 2.81 * 2.81:
2.81 * 0.01 = 0.0281
2.81 * 0.80 = 2.2480
2.81 * 2.00 = 5.6200
0.0281 + 2.2480 = 2.2761
2.2761 + 5.6200 = 7.8961
k = 61.86 / 2.81^2 = 61.86 / 7.8961 = 61.860 / 7.896
= 0 + 1 * 61860 / 7896
= 1 + 1 * 53964 / 7896
= 2 + 1 * 46068 / 7896
= 3 + 1 * 38172 / 7896
= 4 + 1 * 30276 / 7896
= 5 + 1 * 22380 / 7896
= 6 + 1 * 14484 / 7896
= 7 + 1 * 6588 / 7896
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 65880 / 7896
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 57984 / 7896
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 50088 / 7896
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 42192 / 7896
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 34296 / 7896
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 26400 / 7896
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 18504 / 7896
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 10608 / 7896
= 7.8 + 0.1 * 2712 / 7896
= 7.80 + 0.01 * 27120 / 7896
= 7.81 + 0.01 * 19224 / 7896
= 7.82 + 0.01 * 11328 / 7896
= 7.83 + 0.01 * 3432 / 7896
= 7.830 + 0.001 * 34320 / 7896
= 7.831 + 0.001 * 26424 / 7896
= 7.832 + 0.001 * 18528 / 7896
= 7.833 + 0.001 * 10632 / 7896
= 7.834 + 0.001 * 2736 / 7896
= 7.834

k values: 7.835, 7.834, 7.834
k values (sorted): 7.834, 7.834, 7.835
The median k is 7.834.

For t = 4.45:
t^2 = 4.45 * 4.45:
4.45 * 0.05 = 0.2225
4.45 * 0.40 = 1.7800
4.45 * 4.00 = 17.8000
0.2225 + 1.7800 = 2.0025
2.0025 + 17.8000 = 19.8025
= 19.8025

d = 7.834 * 19.8025:
7.834 * 0.0005 = 0.0039170
7.834 * 0.0020 = 0.0156680
7.834 * 0.8000 = 6.2672000
7.834 * 9.0000 = 70.5060000
7.834 * 10.0000 = 78.3400000
0.0039170 + 0.0156680 = 0.0195850
0.0195850 + 6.2672000 = 6.2867850
6.2867850 + 70.5060000 = 76.7927850
76.7927850 + 78.3400000 = 155.1327850
= 155.132

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{155.132}
